violations.text: The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 06/11/2025
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine in the kitchen. New Violation. Correct By: 06/11/2025

The food prep sinks do not have a proper air gap. A food prep sink shall be installed to prevent backflow of a liquid into the water supply by providing an air gap. New Violation. Correct By: 06/11/2025
